item.cobblemon_incubator.upgrade.disable: This upgrade is disabled in the server config.
item.cobblemon_incubator.pc_upgrade.desc: Sends hatched Pokemon directly to the linked PC.
Filters eggs by species, Nature, Ability, and IVs.
item.cobblemon_incubator.analyse_upgrade: Disables incubation. With Filter Upgrade, routes matched eggs to an adjacent Gene Fusion Machine.
item.cobblemon_incubator.breeding_scanne: Use on a Pasture Block to preview every possible Cobbreeding egg.
message.cobblemon_incubator.sent_to_pc: %s hatched and was automatically sent to your PC!
message.cobblemon_incubator.pc_full: Your PC is full. The ready egg was moved to the output slot.
message.cobblemon_incubator.breeding_sca: Use the Breeding Scanner on a Pasture Block.
Could not read that Pasture Block.
Cobbreeding is not loaded, so egg previews are unavailable.
This pasture needs at least two Pokemon.
No possible Cobbreeding eggs found in this pasture.
Possible eggs: %s species/forms from %s parent pairs
tooltip.cobblemon_incubator.breeding_sca: Individual Values. These are the inherited stat genes used by Cobblemon.
Cobbreeding inherits 3 IVs from the parents, or 5 if either parent holds a Destiny Knot.
Father/Mother values for each stat. Example: HP 11/3 means father HP IV 11 and mother HP IV 3.
Nature changes stat growth. Without an Everstone, the egg nature is random.
If a parent holds an Everstone, Cobbreeding can inherit that parent's Nature.
Ability inheritance uses the mother, or the non-Ditto parent. Normal abilities have an 80% inheritance chance; hidden abilities use 60%.
The egg usually inherits the mother's ball. Same-species parents can pass either ball; Ditto pairs use the non-Ditto parent.
Moves the child can hatch with if either parent knows or can access them.
tooltip.cobblemon_incubator.ivs: IVs: HP %s | Atk %s | Def %s | SpA %s | SpD %s | Spe %s
item.cobblemon_incubator.stem_cell_syrin: Absorbs cells from defeated wild Pokemon per type. Used to power the Gene Fusion Machine.
gui.cobblemon_incubator.gene_fusion.fuse: Combine eggs into a single egg with the best stats
item.cobblemon_incubator.gene_fusion.dis: Gene Fusion is disabled in the server config.
